title: Legally Distinct Dorfeldt World: A Tail of Teushitties
description: a magical world of building and social adventure
body:
# Legally Distinct Dorfeldt World
Welcome to Legally Distinct Dorfeldt World, where you can eat all the pasta-based products you want*.

Legally Distinct Dorfeldt World: A Tale of Teushitties is a curated kitchen sinky modpack, made for an SMP. Content mods were generally chosen for non-overlapping themes, interesting ideas, and large breadth of content, with many tiny tweaks thrown in to round out the pack. All pack content should be discoverable either through exploration, or by our innovative Loading Screen Tips.

## A Tale of Teushitties
A large portion of the pack was selected for use in building! Make and display cute foods in a busy cafe, decorate markets, or build evil lairs. Once you've built yourself a home, set out to explore new biomes, and build paths to link your bases. Choose your own challenges as you explore the world and discover the magic left in every corner.

## Requirements
This pack was made and tested on a decade-old laptop, and optimized for performance therein. Equivalent hardware with 4GB of RAM allocated is plenty to play with none of the optional mods enabled.

## Personal Note
You won't find these mods all functioning together anywhere else! I've manually patched numerous mods to ensure proper functionality in cases where they would otherwise crash.

Because of that, though, please **DO NOT** contact any of the original mod authors about bugs found in this pack! Contact me first, and I'll do my own testing to see where the issue lies.
